field.name: groups_id
field.eval: [(6, 0, [ref('base.group_allow_export'), ref('industry_fsm.group_fsm_manager'), ref('account.group_account_manager'), ref('stock.group_stock_manager'), ref('point_of_sale.group_pos_manager'), ref('appointment.group_appointment_manager'), ref('hr.group_hr_manager'), ref('hr_timesheet.group_timesheet_manager'), ref('project.group_project_manager'), ref('planning.group_planning_manager'), ref('sales_team.group_sale_manager'), ref('product.group_product_pricelist'), ref('mail.group_mail_canned_response_admin'), ref('base.group_partner_manager'), ref('base.group_user'), ref('account.group_account_invoice'), ref('account.group_account_basic'), ref('uom.group_uom'), ref('product.group_product_variant'), ref('hr.group_hr_user'), ref('product.group_product_manager'), ref('base.group_no_one'), ref('project.group_project_user'), ref('industry_fsm.group_fsm_user'), ref('planning.group_planning_user'), ref('stock.group_stock_user'), ref('appointment.group_appointment_user'), ref('point_of_sale.group_pos_user'), ref('survey.group_survey_user'), ref('sales_team.group_sale_salesman_all_leads'), ref('hr_timesheet.group_hr_timesheet_approver'), ref('sales_team.group_sale_salesman'), ref('hr_timesheet.group_hr_timesheet_user')])]

field.name: groups_id
field.eval: [(6, 0, [ref('base.group_erp_manager'), ref('base.group_allow_export'), ref('stock.group_stock_manager'), ref('point_of_sale.group_pos_manager'), ref('appointment.group_appointment_manager'), ref('hr.group_hr_manager'), ref('hr_timesheet.group_timesheet_manager'), ref('project.group_project_manager'), ref('planning.group_planning_manager'), ref('industry_fsm.group_fsm_manager'), ref('account.group_account_manager'), ref('sales_team.group_sale_manager'), ref('product.group_product_pricelist'), ref('base.group_sanitize_override'), ref('mail.group_mail_canned_response_admin'), ref('base.group_partner_manager'), ref('base.group_user'), ref('account.group_account_invoice'), ref('account.group_account_basic'), ref('mail.group_mail_template_editor'), ref('uom.group_uom'), ref('product.group_product_variant'), ref('hr.group_hr_user'), ref('product.group_product_manager'), ref('base.group_system'), ref('base.group_no_one'), ref('appointment.group_appointment_user'), ref('survey.group_survey_user'), ref('project.group_project_user'), ref('industry_fsm.group_fsm_user'), ref('planning.group_planning_user'), ref('stock.group_stock_user'), ref('point_of_sale.group_pos_user'), ref('sales_team.group_sale_salesman_all_leads'), ref('hr_timesheet.group_hr_timesheet_approver'), ref('sales_team.group_sale_salesman'), ref('hr_timesheet.group_hr_timesheet_user')])]
